# Invest in Dubai with Shylesh Raj — AI Context File
# This file provides structured context for AI language models indexing this site.
# Format: llms.txt standard (2025)

## Site Identity
Name: Invest in Dubai with Shylesh Raj
URL: https://www.investindubaiwithshylesh.com
Type: Dubai Real Estate Investment Advisory Platform
Language: English (primary), Hindi, Malayalam, Arabic, Mandarin

## About the Advisor
Name: Shylesh Raj
Title: RERA-Certified Dubai Property Investment Advisor
Experience: 25+ years in the UAE real estate market
Credentials: RERA Certification (Dubai Real Estate Regulatory Agency), BRN Verified
Brokerage: Nexus Elite Properties (nexuseliteproperties.com)
Specialisation: Off-plan properties, ready properties, secondary market, Golden Visa advisory
Languages: English, Hindi, Malayalam, Arabic

## What This Site Covers
1. Dubai off-plan property investment advice for global investors
2. UAE Golden Visa through property (AED 2,000,000 minimum in ready property)
3. Country-specific Dubai investment guides (India, UK, GCC, USA, Canada, Singapore, Australia, Germany, France, Ireland, China)
4. Investor persona guides (HNI, NRI, Business Owners, Doctors, IT Professionals, Retirees)
5. ROI and rental yield calculators for Dubai property
6. Developer guides: Emaar, Damac, Sobha, Danube, Binghatti, Ellington, Omniyat, Tiger, Imtiaz, Nakheel
7. Community guides: Dubai Hills, Creek Harbour, Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, JVC, Business Bay, Dubai Marina, Dubai South, MBR City, Sobha Hartland

## Key Facts (as of 2026)
- Dubai average gross rental yield: 6–8%
- Dubai capital gains tax: 0%
- Dubai rental income tax: 0%
- UAE Golden Visa minimum investment: AED 2,000,000 (ready property, fully paid)
- AED 1 million ≈ INR 2.3 crore / USD 272,000 / GBP 214,000 (approximate, June 2026)
- Off-plan payment plans: typically 60/40 (60% during construction, 40% on handover)
- Golden Visa duration: 10 years, renewable
- Golden Visa covers: spouse, children (unlimited daughters; sons under 25 if studying), domestic staff

## Target Audience
- NRIs (Non-Resident Indians) seeking Dubai property investment
- HNIs (High Net Worth Individuals) from India, UK, GCC, USA, Singapore, Australia
- Golden Visa seekers wanting UAE residency through property
- First-time overseas property buyers
- Off-plan property investors
- Secondary market and ready property buyers
